summary: Tested 10 new minutes templates (investment_policy, loan_authorization, insurance_authorization, annual_review, quarterly_review, trustee_compensation, trustee_resignation, beneficiary_request_denial, hems_distribution, beneficiary_loan). Fixed critical bug in MinutesTemplateType enum. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). All 10 new templates render correctly on frontend with working form fields and PDF generation.

critical.issue: FIXED - MinutesTemplateType enum in models.py was missing all 10 new template types, causing 422 validation errors

seed_data_creation: Created test minutes templates via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: 10 new minutes templates are fully working. The MinutesTemplateType enum in /app/backend/models.py was updated to include all new template types. Each template has: 1) Backend content generator function in /app/backend/routers/minutes.py 2) Frontend form state and fields in /app/frontend/src/pages/MinutesTemplateFormPage.js. All templates visible in gallery at /minutes/templates.

template_options_endpoint.details: GET /api/template-options returns all 21 templates (10 new + 10 existing + blank)

investment_policy.details: Form renders with Policy Action, Risk Tolerance, Review Frequency fields. Generates document with Investment Policy content.

loan_authorization.details: Form supports both making and receiving loans. Includes borrower/lender, amount, interest rate, term, purpose, collateral fields.

insurance_authorization.details: Form includes insurance type, policy action, insurer, coverage amount, premium, description fields.

annual_review.details: Form includes fiscal year, financial summary fields (assets, income, expenses, distributions, investment return), key accomplishments, priorities, governance items.

quarterly_review.details: Form includes quarter selector, financial balances, discussion items, action items.

trustee_compensation.details: Form includes trustee name, compensation type/amount, effective date, duties description. Supports all trustees option.

trustee_resignation.details: Form includes departing trustee, departure type (resignation/removal/death/incapacity), reason, remaining trustees, successor appointment.

beneficiary_request_denial.details: Form includes beneficiary name, request type/amount/purpose, denial reasons, alternative offered.

hems_distribution.details: Form includes beneficiary name, HEMS category dropdown (Health/Education/Maintenance/Support), amount, specific purpose, recurring option.

beneficiary_loan.details: Form includes beneficiary name, loan amount, interest rate (AFR), term, purpose, collateral, repayment terms.

pdf_generation.details: PDF generation works for all new templates. Download PDF button visible and functional.

templates_gallery.details: All 21 templates (including 10 new) visible on /minutes/templates page with correct names, descriptions, and icons.

bug_fixed.issue: MinutesTemplateType enum was missing all 10 new template types, causing POST /api/minutes-templates to return 422 validation errors
bug_fixed.fix: Added all 10 new template types to the enum: investment_policy, loan_authorization, insurance_authorization, annual_review, quarterly_review, trustee_compensation, trustee_resignation, beneficiary_request_denial, hems_distribution, beneficiary_loan
